data.title: XRP Chart Signals Another Massive Move Ahead After Rally Pause
data.description:
XRP stalls after a 61% rally, forming a falling wedge. Support at $2. 70 holds as traders eye a breakout toward $3. 66 and beyond.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/xrp-chart-signals-another-massive-move-ahead-after-rally-pause/

data.title: Trump invites CEOs of US tech giants to dinner, but Musk is absent
data.description: According to NBC and other media reports, last night local time, Trump hosted a dinner at the White House with several tech CEOs. Guests included Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella, Google CEO Sundar Pichai, Apple CEO Tim Cook, AMD CEO Lisa Su, and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. Notably, Musk did not attend the dinner, but the White House stated that his representatives would be in attendance.

data.title: Tech Giants Meet at White House, Discuss AI and U.S. Tech Leadership
data.description:
President Trump hosts leading tech CEOs to discuss AI education and U. S. tech policies, with notable absences of key figures like Elon Musk.
source: https://coincu.com/360111-tech-leaders-white-house-ai-meeting

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Buys Figma Stock Amid 20% Post-Earnings Drop
data.description:
Ark Invest disclosed a stake in Figma after its first earnings sent shares tumbling, as the firm stressed it’s focused on design, not Bitcoin.
source: https://decrypt.co/338197/cathie-woods-ark-invest-buys-figma-stock-amid-20-post-earnings-drop

data.title: Song Shijie, the boss of Beijing's largest OTC margin trading platform, was implicated in money laundering and cryptocurrency scams, leading to the freezing of three Binance accounts.
data.description: Song Shijie, the owner of China's largest over-the-counter (OTC) margin trading platform in Beijing, who owed the national treasury 22 million yuan in fines and confiscations, has paid nearly 200 million yuan in asset forfeiture settlements to the UK and the US. The UK's National Crime Agency seized his London mansion, apartment, and bank accounts, valued at a total of 16.7 million pounds, or approximately 161 million yuan. The funds were determined to have originated from illegal securities trading in China and money laundering in the UK. Caixin reported that Song Shijie was also involved in cryptocurrency scams, resulting in the freezing of three of his Binance accounts, containing approximately $10 million in crypto assets. According to a document filed in a US court in Orlando, Florida, in late March, he abandoned his claims to avoid criminal charges. (Caixin)

data.title: Ray Dalio Says Crypto Could Be An 'Attractive Alternative' As Fiat Money Will Struggle As 'Effective Storeholds' Of Wealth
data.description:
Billionaire hedge fund manager Ray Dalio expressed optimism on Wednesday about the prospect of cryptocurrencies becoming an “attractive alternative” to struggling fiat currencies.

data.title: The past 24 hours have seen a significant amount of ETH movement on-chain, with a value exceeding $390 million.
data.description: According to The Data Nerd, several significant ETH movements occurred in the past 24 hours: 1. BlackRock deposited 33,884 ETH, valued at approximately $148.64 million. 2. Bitwise withdrew 38,709 ETH, valued at approximately $167.22 million. 3. Three new wallets withdrew a total of 22,397 ETH, valued at approximately $96.69 million.

data.title: Tether is in talks to invest in gold mining and currently holds gold reserves worth $8.7 billion
data.description: Tether is in talks to invest in the gold mining industry. The company plans to invest in all stages of the gold supply chain, including mining, refining, trading, and royalty companies. Tether currently holds $8.7 billion worth of gold reserves in a Zurich, Switzerland, vault as collateral for its stablecoin. In June of this year, Tether Investments spent $105 million to acquire a minority stake in Elemental Altus, a Toronto-listed gold royalty company. (Financial Times)

data.title: BNB Price Struggles Below $850 – Is Momentum Fading Fast?
data.description:
BNB price is consolidating losses below the $850 zone. The price is now facing hurdles near $855 and might start another decline in the near term. BNB price is correcting gains and traded below the $855 support zone. The price is now trading below $850 and the 100-hourly simple moving average
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/bnb/bnb-price-struggles-below-850/

data.title: Gate US obtains its 30th state license, bringing its compliant operations to 40 U.S. jurisdictions
data.description: According to the latest news on Gate US's website, the platform has successfully obtained a money transmitter license in Maryland, USA. This brings Gate US's total number of licenses to 30, and its compliance business coverage has expanded to 40 US jurisdictions, including Illinois, Ohio, Michigan, North Carolina, Georgia, and Arizona.

data.title: The number of xBTC minted on Sui has exceeded 875
data.description: OKX CEO Star posted on the X platform that xBTC is unlocking Bitcoin's liquidity for the on-chain world, with over 875 xBTC minted on Sui. Star emphasized that this is just the beginning, saying that developers and users now have a new way to participate in DeFi and earn more through liquidity. Furthermore, according to user @erikaleetv, users who provide liquidity to designated xBTC-related pools can earn an annualized return of up to 77%.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $227 million yesterday, with only BlackRock's IBIT ETF seeing a net inflow
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $227 million yesterday (September 4th, US Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was Blackrock's IBIT ETF, with a net inflow of $135 million, bringing IBIT's total net inflow to $58.804 billion. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow yesterday was Ark Invest and 21 Shares' ARKB ETF, with a net outflow of $125 million, bringing ARKB's total net inflow to $2.012 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was $142.303 billion, with a net asset value ratio (market capitalization relative to the total Bitcoin market capitalization) of 6.47%, and cumulative net inflows to $54.647 billion.

data.title: Mining News Highlights of the Week: Cango Releases Q2 Report, Showing Strong Revenue and Profit Performance
data.description: Week 36, 2025 (August 30-September 4): 1. According to cloverpool, the average Bitcoin network hashrate was 973 EH/s, with a high of 1064 EH/s and a low of 851 EH/s, a decrease of -0.54% from the previous week's average hashrate of 978 EH/s. 2. According to blockchain.com, the average Bitcoin price was $110,023, with a high of $112,643 and a low of $107,250, a decrease of 2.68% from the previous week's average price of $113,048. 3. Mining news worth noting include: (1) American Bitcoin was listed on the US stock market and expanded its Bitcoin mining business from 10 EH/s to 24 EH/s; (2) JPMorgan Chase: The total market capitalization of 13 US-listed Bitcoin mining companies reached a record high in August, a 23% increase from the previous month; (3) Cango released its Q2 financial report, showing strong revenue and profit performance. The book loss from two one-time accounting adjustments was not a real loss for the business. The company is targeting the high-value scenario of "AI computing power and energy synergy" in the long term. Data partner: Cango Inc. (CANG), a Bitcoin mining company listed on the NYSE.

data.title: BitMEX to launch new quarterly futures for BTC, ETH, XRP, etc.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BitMEX announced that new quarterly futures such as BTC, ETH, and XRP will soon be available on BitMEX, with trading scheduled to begin at 12:00 (UTC+8) on September 9th next week.

data.title: Bitget's on-chain trading volume increased by 80% to $56 million in a single day, setting a new record.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Bitget's on-chain trading (Onchain) sector had a trading volume of US$56 million yesterday, possibly influenced by the on-chain trading competition and the launch of more than 100 US stock tokens supported by Ondo. The single-day trading volume increased by 80% compared with the previous day, setting a new record.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $167 million yesterday, marking the fourth consecutive day of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $167 million yesterday (September 4th, US Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was the Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a net inflow of $149 million, bringing ETHA's total net inflow to $13.122 billion. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow yesterday was the Fidelity ETF FETH, with a net outflow of $217 million, bringing FETH's total net inflow to $2.515 billion. As of press time, the Ethereum spot ETF's total net asset value (NAV) was $27.78 billion, with a 5.34% ETF NAV ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization), and a total net inflow of $13.172 billion.
